endpoints.name: Bird Keeper (unwired, refused per anti-confab v4)

description: Slate-prescribed mass extension: Bea, Allister, Opal, Nessa, Cara Liss, Leon, Melony, Kabu, Bird Keeper, Rose, Rose Tower, Boss's Orders, Milo, Oleana, Sonia. Grep-check: ELEVEN of those FIFTEEN cards are ALREADY wired to galar-gym-challenge or macro-cosmos or team-rocket from prior waves (Bea, Allister, Opal, Nessa, Leon, Melony, Kabu, Milo wired to galar-gym-challenge; Rose, Rose Tower, Oleana wired to macro-cosmos; Boss's Orders wired to team-rocket as Giovanni). Edgelord steps aside, the wiring is done. Of the four REMAINING candidates, three are refused: Cara Liss is a Galar fossil-paleontologist NPC at Route 6 (researcher, not Gym Leader, not Macro Cosmos — doesn't fit either existing node, and at N=2 with Sonia falls below per-cohort threshold for a `galar-researchers` candidate); Sonia is Professor Magnolia's granddaughter and post-game Galar Professor (researcher, parallel refusal); Bird Keeper is the canonical Pokemon Trainer-class card (a recurring NPC archetype, NOT a named individual — anti-confab v4 forbids wiring an unnamed Trainer-class Supporter to a character node). Future Galar-researchers cohort triaged at N=2-below-threshold. NO wiring drawn this pass; what the slate prescribed was already done; what wasn't done can't be done correctly. Edgelord remains laconic.
citations: [Bulbapedia: Sonia; Bulbapedia: Cara Liss; Bulbapedia: Bird Keeper (Trainer class)]
